heroHeadline: El Mayo Sentencing 7 Days Away — 620 Days Since Capture, 574 Days of Cartel Civil War
heroSubtitle: 620 days since Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada's alleged kidnapping — 2,412+ homicides, 9,000+ families displaced. El Mayo faces mandatory life imprisonment and a $15 billion forfeiture at his April 13 sentencing before Judge Brian Cogan (EDNY); the US prosecution's response to his defense memo was due April 6. Escuinapa municipality has seen a surge of violence: 4 police officers killed in a highway ambush (Mar 31) and an armed clash with army troops (Apr 5, 3 minors detained). Mexican Navy dismantled a Chapitos-linked meth lab in Cosalá (Apr 3, 1,000L of P2P precursor). La Mayiza controls approximately 90% of former Chapitos territory. Chapitos security chief 'El Chuta' remains at large following his February 2026 Chicago narcoterrorism indictment.
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR, Al Jazeera, AFP, Infobae, La Jornada, CBC News, Excelsior
